spec.long_desc: The mayor stands in the town hall, attending to the business of governing Millbrook with visible industry.
spec.detailed_desc: An older man with thinning hair and the kind of face that has heard a lot of petitions, the mayor has the slightly distracted air of someone with more tasks than hours. His robes are well-made but show the creases of a long day. He is courteous in the practiced way of elected officials, and gives the impression of weighing every word for political cost before spending it.
